headline: Lam Research Corp. (LRCX) Targets Growth in Foundry and Logic Markets
summary: Lam Research Corp. (NASDAQ:LRCX) is one of the debt free halal stocks to buy. On March 3 at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference 2026, Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) asserted that its future lies in the foundry and logic markets. It is also targeting a gross margin of over 50% through strategic pricing and […]

headline: Lam Research BESI Talks Highlight Push Into Advanced Packaging Content
summary: Lam Research (NasdaqGS:LRCX) has reportedly held takeover talks with BE Semiconductor Industries (BESI). The discussions point to potential M&A activity that could affect the semiconductor equipment supply chain. The move focuses attention on advanced packaging tools and Lam's position across key chipmaking workflows. Lam Research is a major supplier of wafer fabrication equipment to logic, memory, and foundry customers worldwide, and BESI focuses on advanced packaging and assembly...

headline: HP Enterprise confirms memory shortage will last longer than expected
summary: “I keep thinking this has got to end, but we got confirmation this week from HP Enterprise that it’s going to go on for much longer than people think.” That’s Jim Cramer, and the “it” he’s referring to is the global memory shortage that has quietly become one of the most consequential supply stories in ... HP Enterprise confirms memory shortage will last longer than expected

headline: 2 Cash-Heavy Stocks with Exciting Potential and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: A cash-heavy balance sheet is often a sign of strength, but not always. Some companies avoid debt because they have weak business models, limited expansion opportunities, or inconsistent cash flow.
